manifest.name: Zettelkasten Outliner

name: Zettelkasten Outliner

releases.author: tylersuzukinelson
releases.description:
- Fixed a bug where the outline would sometimes error out because it was being opened before it was populated
- Changed the outline to show the embedded note preview by default
  
  _The long-term plan is to make this an option via the settings so you can choose whether to use the embedded note preview or just a link to the note._
releases.name: Fix bug where outline is opened before it's populated

releases.author: tylersuzukinelson
releases.description:
- Fixes a bug where the outline wouldn't correctly account for folders when traversing related notes
- Plugin now opens the generated outline after use
releases.name: Fix folder bug

releases.author: tylersuzukinelson
releases.description: Create a basic outline rooted at the currently open note.
